hook_text: 7 Sanad compliance checks every Omani employer should run this month.
body:
Most Sanad issues aren't discovered at the audit. They're discovered at the worst possible moment.

Here's the monthly checklist we give every SmartPRO Hub client:

1. Verify active worker count matches Ministry records
Discrepancies of more than 5% trigger automatic review flags.

2. Check visa expiry dates — 60 days forward
Any expiry inside 60 days needs action initiated now.

3. Confirm profession codes match actual job roles
Mismatched codes are a top-3 cause of Sanad violations.

4. Audit your Omanization ratio against your establishment category
Requirements differ by sector and workforce size.

5. Validate all transfer documentation is uploaded
Any employee transfer without documentation is a pending fine.

6. Review any employees on LWOP (leave without pay)
LWOP status must be reported; unreported LWOP is flagged.

7. Confirm your contact details at MOL are current
Inspection notices go to the registered address. Old email = missed notice.

Most companies do 2-3 of these. The ones that do all 7 don't get surprised.

---

Which of these does your team actually run monthly? Be honest below.
cta: DM "CHECKLIST" for the full 20-point version in PDF.
